content.en:
"Father!"

Ye Xingchen saw his father Ye Tian, and hurriedly got up and shouted.

"Xingchen, what's the matter with you, why did you suddenly master the power of the Dark Taboo?"

Ye Tian asked.

Ye Xingchen hurriedly explained: "Father, I came to this planet before, and this treasure land happened unexpectedly, but after I came in, I remembered the forbidden treasure land that my father said, but I couldn't get out for a while, so I explored here." Then I saw the tree, and it bore a black fruit. I thought it must be a treasure and wanted to take it off and look at it, but as soon as I took it off, it melted into my body. I had no choice but to try to refine it. As a result, I mastered the power of the Dark Forbidden and even broke through to the Great Dao Realm and became a True Ancestor!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

He looked at the giant tree, which was no longer fruitful, apparently the only one.

"Xingchen, have you explored the entire space?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Father, I didn't have time to explore, I only saw this giant tree, and I came here!" Ye Xingchen said.

"Be careful, stay here and don't move, I'll take a look around!" Ye Tian said, and walked around.

This place has a lot of space, but perhaps because it has not yet been fully conceived, there are very few forbidden strange things here, Ye Tian searched for a long time before he found a few, and they were all low-grade forbidden strange things, and their value was not very large.

"It seems that the most valuable thing is this giant tree!"

Ye Tian came to the giant tree again, and couldn't help but sigh that his son's luck was really against the sky, and he was able to encounter such an opportunity.

He had also wanted his children and wife to master the power of the dark taboo, but he couldn't, after all, they didn't have the talent to copy and couldn't copy the body.

And a forbidden treasure like the Forbidden Divine Tree Fragment, he couldn't get it.

But now he didn't expect that his son would have a chance to master the power of the dark taboo.

"If this tree can give birth to such a fruit, it must be very extraordinary, and it can't be useless!" Ye Tian muttered.

His divine sense tried to penetrate the forbidden tree, but was blocked by a force, and he couldn't penetrate half of it.

Even the copy talent can't detect the talent of this tree, I don't know if the tree is not a living being, or if the tree contains some special rules that prevent the copy talent.

"Xingchen, you get out of the way!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

Ye Xingchen hurriedly retreated and stayed away from here.

Immediately, Ye Tian stabbed the tree fiercely with the forbidden spear in his hand.

Boom!

A thin screen of rules blocked Ye Tian's forbidden spear, which allowed Ye Tian's guess to be confirmed.

This tree is not simple, and it contains a special rule that blends into the heavens and the earth, and even the copying talent cannot detect its condition.

But this doesn't mean that copying talents is useless, as long as this layer of rules is broken, copying talents can detect the information of this giant tree.

"Break it for me!"

Ye Tian struck with all his strength and bombarded the rule screen.

Thundered!!!!

The giant tree is shaking, and the regular screen is cracking.

After all, this is just a kind of heaven and earth rule, and it does not have real attack and defense capabilities, plus this giant tree may not have really grown up, so it is difficult to resist Ye Tian's attack.

Under several attacks, the rule screen was completely shattered.

And at this time, Ye Tian's copying talent finally detected the situation of this giant tree.

Talent Identification
Species: Forbidden Tree
Defense Origin Talent: Super God Level
Devouring Origin Talent: Super God Level
Healing Origin Talent: Super God Level

Introduction: The descendants of the Forbidden Divine Tree, there is a glimmer of hope for growing into the Forbidden Divine Tree in the future, ten trillion years can give birth to a Heavenly Forbidden Fruit, the Heavenly Forbidden Fruit can help living beings control the power of the dark taboo, and the heart of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree is contained inside, and the power of the Dark Forbidden Tree can be controlled after refining, and it can also break the shackles of living beings and surpass the limit, and a Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart can only be used by six people. Note: The Heavenly Forbidden Divine Tree is taken out, and the Heavenly Forbidden Tree is turned into an ordinary tree!

"It turned out to be called the Heavenly Forbidden Tree!"

Through this introduction, Ye Tian had a thorough understanding of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree.

To put it simply, it is indeed a weakened version of the Forbidden Divine Tree, after all, it was only born in this forbidden treasure land, and naturally it cannot be a forbidden treasure that is too rebellious.

According to the division of cultivators, it is estimated that it is not even a forbidden treasure, it can only be regarded as a top-level forbidden treasure, but because its effect is too great, it is enough to be comparable to a forbidden treasure.

For the Supreme Dao Ancestor, this Heavenly Forbidden Tree was completely useless, but for others, this Heavenly Forbidden Tree was a supreme treasure.

"One Heavenly Forbidden Fruit is born in a billion years, and if you have the confidence to wait, it is enough to cultivate a large number of Heavenly Forbidden Fruits. But for such a long time, I don't have the confidence to wait. Although it would be a loss to take out the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart directly, it was far from being comparable to the endless Heavenly Forbidden Fruit, but it could cultivate several True Ancestors who had mastered the power of the Dark Forbidden in a short period of time. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Another point, he was worried that this forbidden treasure land would be exposed, and when the time came, I was afraid that countless True Ancestors would go crazy, and those powerful Dao Ancestors would also forcibly come out and snatch the ownership of this Heavenly Forbidden Tree.

When the time comes, how can he have the opportunity to slowly cultivate the Heavenly Forbidden Tree!

Therefore, taking the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart directly is undoubtedly one of the best options.

Moreover, the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart also has the effect of breaking the shackles of living beings and transcending the limit, which may help him break through to the supreme true ancestor combat power.

"I'm sorry!"

Ye Tian frantically attacked the heart of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree.

A doorway technique bombarded the heart of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree, and even if the Heavenly Forbidden Tree's defense was very strong, it would be difficult to resist Ye Tian's attack.

After a while, the Heavenly Forbidden Tree cracked.

After bombarding for an hour, Ye Tiancai completely knocked the Heavenly Forbidden Tree out of a huge passage.

Subsequently, Ye Tian drilled into the body of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree and found the heart of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree.

Just when Ye Tian was about to take away the heart of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree, the Heavenly Forbidden Tree began its final resistance.

Thundered!!!!

The chains of rules were bound one after another, as if they wanted to stop Ye Tian.

The Heavenly Forbidden Tree itself has no wisdom, but under the protection of its own rules, it has the ability to fight back.

However, these couldn't help Ye Tian.

"Great Wilderness Law Body!"

The Thousand Dao Technique, which was close to the Consummation Realm, protected Ye Tian, and it was difficult to cause him any damage to him if he was restrained by any attack from these rule chains.

When Ye Tian kept trying to take away the heart of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree, the leaves of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree began to wither, the bark began to dry up, and the vitality seemed to pass slowly.

Moreover, the aura of this Heavenly Forbidden Tree continued to decline, gradually becoming ordinary.

Click!

Accompanied by a certain crisp sound, it means that the heart of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree has been completely taken away by Ye Tian, and it also means that this Heavenly Forbidden Tree is no longer a Heavenly Forbidden Tree, but an ordinary giant tree, the foundation is completely broken, and there is no hope for any improvement.

Ye Tian looked at the huge tree center ten meters long in front of him, nodded with satisfaction, and put it away with a wave of his hand.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen flew over.

"Let's go, this forbidden treasure land is of little value at the moment, but you can send someone to guard it, and if any more treasures are bred, we can also know as soon as possible!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen nodded.

Immediately, Ye Tian took Ye Xingchen to tear apart the void of the forbidden treasure land and returned to the outside world.

After all, for Xingchen, the impregnable space barrier is nothing to him.

It's just that it's hard to find a location for this kind of forbidden treasure land, but it's not very difficult to get out of it.

Soon, Ye Tian returned to the human race with his son Ye Xingchen.

As soon as possible, he called his wife Xiao Yue, sister Ye Yu, and daughter Ye Xingyue to take out the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart, and informed them of the usefulness of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart.

For a moment, the three of them were shocked.

Their knowledge is not short, and they know how precious such a treasure is, and saying it is enough to cause countless Dao Ancestors to fight desperately!

They were not hypocritical, one of them took a copy of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart, and refined it in Ye Tian's palace in case something unexpected happened.

Ye Tian personally protected the Dharma and let them retreat and refine.

With the passage of time, the three of them gradually refined the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart, and they all controlled the power of the Dark Forbidden Tree, and the foundation improved a lot, and the shackles of the creatures in the underworld were broken by the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart.

In other words, their chances of impacting the Supreme True Ancestor in the future far surpassed those of others.

However, even if the shackles are broken, whether they have a chance to impact the Supreme True Ancestor also depends on chance and luck.

For example, many True Ancestors, even if there is no bottleneck between the Invincible True Ancestor and the Supreme True Ancestor, they can't break through!

After all, they couldn't even reach the ultimate of the Invincible True Ancestor, and they didn't even have the qualifications to impact the Supreme True Ancestor.

When Xiao Yue, Ye Yu, and Ye Xingyue controlled the power of the Dark Forbidden Tree, Ye Tian also began to refine a Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart.

He was very curious about what kind of changes would occur after he refined the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart.
